introSection: Curse of the Werewolf is a steel launched spinning roller coaster built by German company Mack Rides currently located at Universal Epic Universe in Orlando, Florida, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride opened with the park on May 22, 2025.

fullText:
Curse of the Werewolf is a steel launched spinning roller coaster built by German company Mack Rides currently located at Universal Epic Universe in Orlando, Florida, USA.

The ride opened with the park on May 22, 2025.
